reference: I had surgery with a scope down my throat. Now I have bumps on the back of my tongue. What is wrong? They all had initial first names. Their middle names were biblical names. There was J.D., my biological dad, and R.C., and J.C., and a few more I probably forgot.
text: I had surgery with a scope down my throat; now I have bumps on the back of my tongue. What is wrong? They all had initial first names. Their middle of biblical names. There was JD, my biological dad, and RC, and JC, and a few more I probably forgot.
